name: gerald-playwright-mcp-blueprint
guarantees: official Playwright MCP tool surface is preserved behind Gerald policy guards
one browser runtime per MCP process
persistent Chromium auth profile is stored outside the project repository
Playwright output defaults to OS temp storage
relative screenshot filenames are rewritten into the temp output directory before upstream Playwright receives them
page YAML and console logs use upstream stdout mode instead of repository files
loopback IP hosts such as 127.0.0.1 and ::1 are rewritten to localhost before upstream navigation
non-loopback numeric IP hosts are rejected before upstream navigation
localhost is allowed for local development
browser automation defaults to a visible window and strips inherited --headless unless GERALD_PLAYWRIGHT_ALLOW_HEADLESS=1
Chromium sandboxing is enabled by default with upstream PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_SANDBOX=1
the initial about:blank tab is reused for the first new-tab request instead of being left open
auth gates wait briefly and recheck before returning AUTH_REQUIRED
